# Nova Marketing - Digital Marketing Agency for SMEs
Nova Marketing is a specialized digital marketing agency helping small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) grow through performance-driven strategies in SEO, Google Ads, and Web Design.

## Core Services
- **SEO for SMEs**: Specialized search engine optimization to improve organic visibility.
- **Google Ads (SEM)**: Professional management of high-converting advertising campaigns.
- **Web Design**: Conversion-oriented web development using modern technologies.
- **Marketing Consulting**: Strategic growth guidance for local and national businesses.

## Target Markets
Specialized services in Catalonia, specifically:
- Barcelona
- Sabadell
- Terrassa
- Sant Cugat

## Multilingual Support
The website is fully accessible in two languages:
- **Spanish (ES)**: https://novamarketing.es/
- **Catalan (CA)**: https://novamarketing.es/ca/

## Key Resources
- **Case Studies (ES)**: https://novamarketing.es/casos-exito/
- **Case Studies (CA)**: https://novamarketing.es/ca/casos-exit/
- **Blog (ES)**: https://novamarketing.es/blog/
- **Blog (CA)**: https://novamarketing.es/ca/blog/

## Legal & Compliance
- Aviso Legal: https://novamarketing.es/aviso-legal/
- Política de Privacidad: https://novamarketing.es/privacidad/
- Política de Cookies: https://novamarketing.es/cookies/
- Términos y Condiciones: https://novamarketing.es/terminos-y-condiciones/

## Technical Details
- **Tech Stack**: Built with Astro (v6+) and Strapi CMS.
- **Owner**: Sergio García López
- **Location**: Sabadell, Barcelona, Spain.
